creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This speed test https://www.speedtest.net/ shows ~60Mbps on a computer connected at 600+Mbps.

Something is wrong with network data rate in Chromium.

Firefox also has a similar problem but not as severe - it shows 400Mbps instead of 600Mbps.

Version 100.0.4896.60 (Official Build) (64-bit)
